docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $996.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS DOUGLAS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-21-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS DOUGLAS
UNTIMELY SERVICE AS TO DOUGLAS VARGAS, NOT SERVED 25 DAYS PRIOR HRG. ON SUBSERVICE.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARGAS DOUGLAS $996.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,021.79 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF JUDGMENT TO DOUGLAS VARGAS RETURNED ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $706.17 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS DOUGLAS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS DOUGLAS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS DOUGLAS
COMPARE AND/OR CERTIFY COPY OF ANY RECORD ON FILE FOR FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,804.32 AS TO DEFENDANT VARGAS DOUGLAS
